name: find_transaction
description: Look up a specific transaction by its ID or search for transactions matching criteria. Returns full transaction details including status, amount, payment method, customer info, and settlement details. You can also search by status, amount range, date range, payment method type, customer ID, and more. Essential for order management, reconciliation, and customer support.
note: Braintree uses a GraphQL API. The legacy REST endpoints are GET /merchants/{merchant_id}/transactions/{id} for lookup and POST /merchants/{merchant_id}/transactions/advanced_search for search.

parameters.name: transaction_id
parameters.description: The unique transaction ID to look up. Use this for a direct lookup of a known transaction.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by transaction status. Options: authorized, submitted_for_settlement, settling, settled, voided, failed, gateway_rejected, processor_declined.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Filter by amount range with min and max values.

parameters.name: payment_method_type
parameters.description: Filter by payment method type. Options: credit_card, paypal, venmo, apple_pay, google_pay.

body.query: query SearchTransactions($input: TransactionSearchInput!) { search { transactions(input: $input) { edges { node { id status amount { value currencyCode } paymentMethod { details { ... on CreditCardDetails { last4 cardType expirationMonth expirationYear } } } customer { id email } createdAt } } } } }
